core.product: AI ad intelligence and creative generation tool
core.offer: Analyze competitor ads psychologically and generate ready-to-run brand creatives

mechanism.buyer_job: Beat competitors on paid social without burning weeks on manual research
mechanism.primary_pain: Hours lost to inspiration scrolling and copying aesthetics without understanding why ads work
mechanism.unique_mechanism: AI psychological deconstruction — breaks down visual and psychological elements driving ad performance, then generates creatives engineered to same psychological triggers
mechanism.must_show_visually: Product UI — ad analysis dashboard with psychological breakdown panels
mechanism.must_explain_verbally: The decode-then-generate loop and why it beats surface-level copying

allowed: Decodes the psychology behind high-performing ads
Generates ready-to-run creative for your brand
forbidden: Named brand clients not in source
requires_proof_nearby: Chris L. quote requires GM @ Fitness Brand attribution
All testimonials need name and title

proof_inventory.exact_quote: I've tried this... they're actually really good.
It's better than anything I've seen.
This is going to be a hugely popular tool.
